allow: Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./scripts/test-response.json'\).report; console.log\('=== key_orders ==='\); r.key_orders.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>console.log\(\(i+1\)+'. '+s\)\); console.log\('\\n=== summary ==='\); console.log\(r.summary.headline\); console.log\('phase:', r.summary.early_phase, '/', r.summary.mid_phase, '/', r.summary.late_phase\); console.log\('win:', r.summary.win_condition\); console.log\('risk:', r.summary.key_risk\); console.log\('\\n=== my_champion_guide ==='\); Object.entries\(r.my_champion_guide\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(k+': '+v\)\); console.log\('\\n=== lanes ==='\); r.lanes.forEach\(l=>{console.log\('\\n['+l.lane+'] '+l.matchup\); console.log\('  early:',l.early\); console.log\('  mid:',l.mid\); console.log\('  level2:',l.level2\); console.log\('  action:',l.key_action\);}\);")
